query: Do you ship to Singapore? How long does it take?

candidates.candidate_text: International Shipping Policy: We ship to 50+ countries including Singapore. Standard shipping: 10-14 business days via DHL Express. Express shipping: 5-7 business days. Customs duties and taxes are calculated at checkout and are the recipient's responsibility. Free shipping on orders over $200 USD.

FAQ: Shipping to Asia-Pacific — Q: Do you deliver to Singapore? A: Yes, we ship to Singapore via DHL and FedEx. Q: What are typical delivery times? A: 7-12 business days depending on customs clearance. Tracking is provided via email once the order ships.

Carrier Rate Card — DHL Express: Singapore zone (SEA-3). Documents: $35-55 USD, 3-5 days. Parcels up to 5 kg: $65-90 USD, 5-8 days. Fuel surcharge applies. Saturday delivery available at additional cost.

Agent transcript: Customer in Singapore asked about shipping time for ProScan X120. Agent quoted 8-12 business days. Customer opted for express shipping at $75. Order shipped next day. Tracking shared via email.

Domestic shipping policy: Free ground shipping on orders over $50 within the continental US. 2-day express available for $12.99. Overnight shipping for $24.99. No shipping to PO boxes for express options.
